market_pulse: Competitive talent concentration on Palm Tree and Tao Beach (Tiësto, Steve Aoki, David Guetta) while LIV shows strong DJ rotation and digital presence; dayclubs dominating weekend calendar.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (Hakkasan, OMNIA) launching dedicated Wednesday programming for mid-week engagement; LIV lacks visible mid-week promotion beyond main events.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch LIV Wednesday event series or mid-week talent showcase to capture weekday audience.

content_gaps.description: Competitors seeing high TikTok engagement around dress codes and venue guides; LIV not tapping into UGC creator collabs for viral content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Partner with Vegas TikTok creators for dress code challenges and venue tours.

content_gaps.description: Palm Tree and Tao Beach heavily promoting free guest list + drink packages; LIV Beach missing aggressive dayclub promotional pushes.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Amplify LIV Beach dayclub promos with free entry incentives and limited-time drink specials.

Tao Group (parent company) pushing Palm Tree Beach Club, Tao Beach, and OMNIA cross-promotions.
